# vector: status_resp
# STATUS_RESP：RUNNING 态，Scope mode=STREAM
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）

wire: 0352820202022a0202010101010715cd5b07d7110103d61101020701010101010106ebb6cc08010101020901010101010105f511208700
